---
title: "Table 2"
author: "Kanako Terakawa"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
# Generate a DEG table figure (gt) from a significant-gene CSV,
# split into up- and down-regulated sections.
library(gt)
library(dplyr)

create_deg_table <- function(csv_path,                    # CSV of significant genes (rownames = gene)
                             output_dir,
                             filename_base,                # output filename (no extension)
                             figure_label = "Table 1",
                             title_text   = NULL,
                             cohort_label = "KPMP HKD cohort",
                             footer_text  = NULL,
                             save_html    = TRUE,
                             save_png     = TRUE) {

  # Load and split into up/down by logFC
  df <- read.csv(csv_path, row.names = 1)
  df$gene <- rownames(df)

  up <- df %>%
    dplyr::filter(logFC > 0) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(logFC))
  down <- df %>%
    dplyr::filter(logFC < 0) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(logFC)

  n_up   <- nrow(up)
  n_down <- nrow(down)

  cat("Up   genes:", n_up,   "\n")
  cat("Down genes:", n_down, "\n")

  up_label   <- sprintf("Up in high-coupling spots (n = %d)",   n_up)
  down_label <- sprintf("Down in high-coupling spots (n = %d)", n_down)

  combined <- bind_rows(
    up   %>% mutate(group = up_label),
    down %>% mutate(group = down_label)
  ) %>%
    dplyr::select(group, gene, logFC, FDR)

  # Default title / footer
  if (is.null(title_text)) {
    title_text <- sprintf(
      "Significantly differentially expressed genes (FDR < 0.05; %d genes)",
      n_up + n_down
    )
  }
  if (is.null(footer_text)) {
    footer_text <- paste0(
      "log\u2082FC indicates HighCoupling / Reference. ",
      "Pseudo-bulk DGE by edgeR with paired design (~ SampleID + Condition)."
    )
  }

  # Color palette (matched to the volcano plots)
  col_up_header   <- "#FBE5D6"   # pale vermillion
  col_down_header <- "#D9E8F5"   # pale blue
  col_border      <- "#000000"
  col_label_bg    <- "#FFFFFF"

  # Build gt table
  gt_tbl <- combined %>%
    gt(rowname_col = "gene", groupname_col = "group") %>%
    fmt_number(
      columns = "logFC",
      decimals = 2,
      force_sign = TRUE
    ) %>%
    fmt_scientific(
      columns = "FDR",
      decimals = 2
    ) %>%
    cols_label(
      logFC = html("log<sub>2</sub>FC"),
      FDR   = "FDR"
    ) %>%
    cols_align(align = "right", columns = c("logFC", "FDR")) %>%
    cols_align(align = "left",  columns = "gene") %>%
    tab_header(
      title = md(sprintf("**%s.** %s — %s", figure_label, title_text, cohort_label))
    ) %>%
    tab_source_note(source_note = footer_text) %>%
    tab_style(
      style = cell_text(style = "italic"),
      locations = cells_stub()
    ) %>%
    tab_style(
      style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
      locations = cells_column_labels()
    ) %>%
    tab_style(
      style = list(
        cell_fill(color = col_up_header),
        cell_text(weight = "bold")
      ),
      locations = cells_row_groups(groups = up_label)
    ) %>%
    tab_style(
      style = list(
        cell_fill(color = col_down_header),
        cell_text(weight = "bold")
      ),
      locations = cells_row_groups(groups = down_label)
    ) %>%

  # Booktabs-style rules: top, header-bottom, and body-bottom only; no vertical or inner lines
  tab_options(
    table.font.size                  = 10,
    table.font.names                 = "Arial",
    table.background.color           = "white",
    data_row.padding                 = px(3),
    heading.title.font.size          = 12,
    heading.align                    = "left",
    source_notes.font.size           = 8,
    source_notes.padding             = px(4),
    column_labels.font.size          = 10,
    column_labels.font.weight        = "bold",
    column_labels.background.color   = col_label_bg,
    column_labels.padding            = px(4),
    row_group.padding                = px(4),
    row_group.font.weight            = "bold",
    table.border.top.style           = "solid",
    table.border.top.width           = px(1.5),
    table.border.top.color           = col_border,
    table.border.bottom.style        = "solid",
    table.border.bottom.width        = px(1.5),
    table.border.bottom.color        = col_border,
    table.border.left.style          = "none",
    table.border.right.style         = "none",
    column_labels.border.top.style   = "none",
    column_labels.border.bottom.style = "solid",
    column_labels.border.bottom.width = px(0.5),
    column_labels.border.bottom.color = col_border,
    table_body.border.top.style      = "none",
    table_body.border.bottom.style   = "solid",
    table_body.border.bottom.width   = px(1.5),
    table_body.border.bottom.color   = col_border,
    table_body.hlines.style          = "none",
    table_body.vlines.style          = "none",
    row_group.border.top.style       = "solid",
    row_group.border.top.width       = px(0.5),
    row_group.border.top.color       = col_border,
    row_group.border.bottom.style    = "solid",
    row_group.border.bottom.width    = px(0.5),
    row_group.border.bottom.color    = col_border
  )

  # Save
  dir.create(output_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

  if (save_html) {
    html_path <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(filename_base, ".html"))
    gtsave(gt_tbl, html_path)
    cat("Saved HTML:", html_path, "\n")
  }

  if (save_png) {
    png_path <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(filename_base, ".png"))
    tryCatch({
      gtsave(gt_tbl, png_path, expand = 5, zoom = 2)
      cat("Saved PNG :", png_path, "\n")
    }, error = function(e) {
      cat("PNG export error:", e$message, "\n")
      cat("-> requires the webshot2 package: install.packages('webshot2')\n")
    })
  }

  pdf_path <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(filename_base, ".pdf"))
  tryCatch({
    gtsave(gt_tbl, pdf_path, expand = 5, zoom = 2)
    cat("Saved PDF :", pdf_path, "\n")
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("PDF export error:", e$message, "\n")
    cat("-> requires webshot2 + Google Chrome\n")
  })

  return(gt_tbl)
}

# Example: KPMP HKD (Table 2)
gt_hkd <- create_deg_table(
  csv_path      = "/path/to/KPMP_DKD_ST_project/analysis_for_paper/KPMP/HKD/EdgeR_HighCoupling_vs_Reference_FDR0.05_HKD_20260512_154220.csv",
  output_dir    = "/path/to/KPMP_DKD_ST_project/figures_for_paper/Tables/",
  filename_base = "Table_2_HKD_genes_table",
  figure_label  = "Table 2",
  cohort_label  = "KPMP HKD cohort",
  footer_text   = "log\u2082FC indicates HighCoupling / Reference. Pseudo-bulk DGE by edgeR with paired design (~ SampleID + Condition), n = 9 paired samples."
)

print(gt_hkd)
```
